evidence: Empty-description validation is moved to product creation, missing report-stage enforcement.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because validation is placed in the wrong business step.

evidence: 100% non-deductible VAT path is excluded from full non-deductible treatment.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because threshold branching for VAT logic is incorrect.

evidence: VAT Country/Region Code is assigned directly instead of using Validate.
justification: Earliest violation is L2 because validation-triggered propagation is bypassed at execution.

evidence: Bill-to VAT registration fallback runs only when Ship-to country is set.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because fallback condition logic is overly restrictive.

evidence: BOM Quantity Per of 0.005 is rounded to zero, losing valid precision.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because quantity precision business rules are violated.

evidence: Blank attribute values are not gated before mapping insertion.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because required conditional business guard is missing.

evidence: Component Expected Quantity is not scaled by finished-good sales quantity.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because quantity-scaling business logic is incorrect.

evidence: Fractional BOM consumption case miscomputes Quantity per and Expected Quantity relation.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because fractional-quantity business calculations are wrong.

evidence: Non-reservable rule is applied beyond Non-Inventory item scope.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because item-type scope logic is incorrect.

evidence: Non-reservable rule is applied beyond Service item scope.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because item-type scope logic is incorrect.

evidence: Automatic reservations are created for multiple lines, not only Reserve=Always items.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because per-line reservation branching is incorrect.

evidence: Next Task Date drilldown still applies an unintended System Task Type filter.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because query/filter business behavior is wrong.

evidence: Reservation blocking runs even when transfer quantity is not positive.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because quantity-condition workflow gating is incorrect.

evidence: Reservation blocking is not restricted to outbound Qty. to Ship > 0.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because outbound-only condition logic is missing.

evidence: Dimension import is limited incorrectly to G/L Account destination lines.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because destination-type business scope is narrowed incorrectly.

evidence: Non-deductible VAT is added without requiring a non-empty Job currency code.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because currency-dependent posting logic is applied unconditionally.

evidence: Journal template-name check bypass is widened beyond the Vendor-only exception.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because account-type branching in settlement validation is incorrect.

evidence: Vendor Name population is not restricted to Vendor plus Invoice documents.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because compound condition business logic is wrong.

evidence: Currency conversion is applied to Unit Cost instead of Unit Price only.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because field-target business logic for conversion is incorrect.

evidence: Bill-to Customer No. is not copied when source value is empty.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because copy-step business behavior is overly conditional.

evidence: Export is skipped when third-party location equals default fulfillment service.
justification: Earliest violation is L4 because the export eligibility branch is incorrect.
